fluclotizolam.dose_note: Note: These doses are extremely tentative and will vary from user to user depending on many factors including, but not limited to, tolerance.
fluclotizolam.name: fluclotizolam

properties.dose: Oral Light: 250ug Common: 250-500ug Strong: 500-750ug Heavy: 750ug+ | Note: These doses are extremely tentative and will vary from user to user depending on many factors including but not limited to tolerance.
properties.summary: A derivative of Etizolam. There are conflicting reports on its dosage, though reports have suggested that it is approximately 3x the potency of Etizolam, with a shorter half-life.
